reviews.review_title: Cannot seem to buy the full game
reviews.review_description: I have downloaded the demo, played the first three demo levels and really enjoyed them. I would like to buy the full game but, it no longer seems to be available to buy via Meta Horizon. Please could the developer fix this?

reviews.review_title: Seems Good, but Is It Really "Free" Now?
reviews.review_description:
Seems great from what I've played thus far andca step up from "1976 Back to Midway"  (the now unplayable game that is now for me & many others since 2+ weeks ago due to the guns not working anymore for whatever reason, and no fix seemingly ever coming...), so I am glad to have found this title in the arcade selection at the start of the Operation Warcade demo (another game I immediately purchased after trying).
I am very confused on if I actually have the FULL game here though, as I only selected the free DEMO for the game (selecting the full game option in the arcade menu only brings up a blank store page that never loads and searching the game here in the Store only brings up this version I got when selecting" Demo"), and this free version I have is acting like the full game...
So did they just make the game free or did the game never get a full release/ got taken down?. ..
No idea, but I hope I have the complete game so as to have a replacement (especially a free one) for the now unplayably broken 1976 Midway game I paid good money for...
The quality of this game surprised me. It looks fantastic and the gameplay had enough of a twist on a shoot em up to keep me hooked.

What Ivanovich Games delivers here is the absolute crowning glory. Operation Warcade had already impressed me and Beat Blaster is also a great experience, but 2076 Midway Multiverse plays even more with the perspectives and opens up completely different dimensions for me as a shooter fan. The expanded 2D shmup environment paired with game elements from a strafox/space harrier and even a real futuristic flight sim blew my mind at first and still puts a big grin on my face that I can hardly ever stop playing it. There is also a great high score hunt, trashy but funny story with great movie anecdotes, great effects, a long gaming experience and non-stop action.

Lovely unique game .a little star wars game. I would call the game.I would give it five stars  .you can easily get stuck through at  the gates .i don't no if its a bug .  There  are some bugs I hope .I just hope the defs fix them .  🙏

Where can I buy the rest of the 
game because I can’t find it on the app and it only lets me into level one before level 2 a trailer plays but so far I love the game play and I would recommend it

developer_response.body: You must purchase the inApp (one-time purchse) to unlock the of the game. write us to support@ivanovichgames.com if you need more help

reviews.review_title: Horrible controls + it's just a DEMO
reviews.review_description:
Like the headline says, the controls are all over the place. I'm sure the control schemes etc looked good on paper, but don't Ivanovich games have any actual gametesters to give them feedback? Because these controls are just weird, convoluted and generally a hot mess. I played the tutorial and the first two levels and decided that I didn't even want to continue in the super easy Joyride mode because it just wasn't worth my time. That says a LOT about how this game plays in reality. It's uninstalled now.
Then I find that it's only the first three levels and after that you have to pay to continue playing. This is just a demo! That is not mentioned anywhere, so this is technically a form of scam.  It should clearly state that it's a DEMO consisting of the first three levels. How is this even allowed to be listed on App Lab in its current form?

developer_response.body: The control in story mode is too novel and needs more practice before being enjoyed. That's why we made the arcade mode much simpler and more direct. have you tried arcade mode? And for that reason, we also discarded the demo and left 3 levels in 3 free game modes. The idea is that people give him enough time to understand and enjoy this new control proposal before asking anyone for money.

reviews.review_description: The game was free but I still feel I paid too much.

Went in not know what to expect came with my mind blown. The way the game changes gameplay perspective after each level really keeps it going. The left and right hand controlling keeps you busy and the graphics are super high def. Shut up and take my money. 🤪👍

I've really enjoyed this demo. Nice graphics and mechanics. It just makes me hungry for more:
- different ships
- visual upgrades for the guns when they're upgraded
- more weapons
- top down

If you release the full game with a reasonable price, I'll buy it :)
How do you carry on with the other in this game on arcade mode it won't let me.

developer_response.body: We solve your doubts at support@ivanovichgames.com. In any case: you can change the game mode (Arcade/history) from the options menu.

reviews.review_description: I really love this demo and I hope the full game continues to deliver. I love the 3D side scrolling action. I will be buying the full version.
Looking forward to the full game. Superb graphics and enjoyable gameplay.

Arcade shooter, but with a big twist!  As you play, you transition thru something like 4 different perspectives (2d/3d and 3rd person/1st person).  It was very immersive and done creatively (you can control both your ship as well as a shield independently in 3 dimensions).  I was very surprised and loved it!  I've been searching for a good couch/sitting vr game and this it!  I think my only negatives would be the game intro narration.  It's too long and super cheesy, but holds no baring on the actual gameplay.  I'd even suggest 2 game modes.  One is fixed to a perspective while the other is just the way it currently is (collect an immersive coin during gameplay to change perspectives).

Reminds me of R-Type and those other arcade sideways shooters with some lovely VR centric twists. Very good... The demo's is free, try it

When's the full game out? You can have my money - it's here, it has your name on it
I wanted to test midway out I went to play it just was a black screen then restarted it did same thing again didn't understand how to fix it

reviews.review_title: Retro meets VR in fine style!
reviews.review_description:
2076 Midway Multiverse is a direct sequel to 1976 Return to Midway, and it is an improvement in every way. 1976 was done very well, but Ivanovich Games once again prove their passion and dedication to recreating the classics in VR. With great visuals, great music and intuitive, creative, unique gameplay mechanics coupled with great VR implementation, this one gets two thumbs up. 👍🏾👍🏾
Here’s the video review https://youtu.be/plY70qI2fSo
Bellissimo gioco. Grafica cartonata molto carina, bella musica

Needs co-op but besides that awesome game
Love the humor of it
